q: Where is my order?
a: You can track your order using the tracking link sent to your email. Orders typically ship within 1-2 business days.

q: How do I track my shipment?
a: Check your confirmation email for a tracking number. Click the link or enter it at our carrier's site.

q: When will my order arrive?
a: Standard shipping is 5-7 business days. Expedited options are available at checkout.

q: How do I return an item?
a: We accept returns within 30 days of delivery. Items must be unused and in original packaging. Start a return from your order history.

q: How do I get a refund?
a: Refunds are issued to your original payment method within 5-7 business days of receiving your return.

q: Can I exchange an item?
a: Yes, exchanges are processed like a return plus a new order. Contact support to expedite the process.

q: My item arrived damaged. What do I do?
a: Sorry about that! Email us a photo and your order number at support@store.com. We will send a replacement right away.

q: I received the wrong item.
a: We apologize for the mix-up. Please email a photo of what you received and we will ship the correct item immediately.

q: Can I cancel my order?
a: Orders can be cancelled within 1 hour of placement. After that, the order enters fulfillment and cannot be cancelled.

q: Can I change my shipping address?
a: Address changes are possible within 1 hour of ordering. Contact us immediately and we will try to update before shipment.

q: Do you ship internationally?
a: We currently ship to the US, Canada, and UK. International orders may incur customs fees, which are the buyer's responsibility.

q: How much does shipping cost?
a: Standard shipping is free on orders over $50. Orders under $50 have a flat $5.99 shipping fee.

q: What payment methods do you accept?
a: We accept Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover, PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay.

q: Is my payment information secure?
a: Yes. All transactions are encrypted using SSL/TLS. We never store your full card number.

q: I was charged twice. What happened?
a: This is usually a temporary authorization hold. If both charges appear on your statement after 24 hours, contact us immediately.

q: Do you offer promo codes?
a: Yes! Sign up for our newsletter to receive exclusive discount codes. You can apply them at checkout.

q: How do I apply a discount code?
a: Enter your promo code in the Discount Code field at checkout, then click Apply.

q: Why was my promo code rejected?
a: Codes may be expired, single-use already redeemed, or have minimum order requirements. Check the terms of your offer.

q: How do I contact a human agent?
a: Type agent or human at any time and I will connect you with our support team. Available 9am-6pm ET, Monday-Friday.

q: What are your support hours?
a: Our team is available Monday-Friday, 9am-6pm Eastern Time. Outside those hours, I can still help or take your message.
